meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for account-abstraction — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly, use validWhen/invalidWhen/impact for rapid triage, and only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: ERC-7579 Module System — Registry Bypass, moduleType Confusion, Hook PostCheck Skip, Fallback Flaws
cards.detect: ERC-7579 module management has multiple independent failure modes:
check: VERIFY: ERC-7579 module management has multiple independent failure modes
PROVE: *Scenario A — Registry bypass via compromised module [MOD-1]; Attacker submits a malicious module that passes ERC-7484 attestation checks at install time.
ANTIPATTERN: Fallback handler can be called directly by anyone via the fallback function
cards.antipattern: Fallback handler can be called directly by anyone via the fallback function
cards.validWhen: ERC-7579 module management has multiple independent failure modes

cards.title: AA Paymaster Gas Accounting — Prefund Errors, Duplicate Snapshots, Stake Bypass, and Fee Escape
cards.detect: Gas accounting in ERC-4337 is a multi-phase process (validation → execution → postOp) with several hand-off points...
check: VERIFY: Gas accounting in ERC-4337 is a multi-phase process (validation → execution → postOp) with several hand-off points where gas values can be measured...
PROVE: *Scenario A — Inverted prefund multiplier [GAS-1] (OpenZeppelin EIP-4337 audit, HIGH); An op WITHOUT a paymaster submits verificationGasLimit = G.
ANTIPATTERN: preGas reused from before-validation for before-postOp measurement
cards.antipattern: preGas reused from before-validation for before-postOp measurement
cards.validWhen: Gas accounting in ERC-4337 is a multi-phase process (validation → execution → postOp) with several hand-off points where gas values can be measured incorrectly

cards.title: Session Key Abuse — Spend Limit Bypass, Cross-Wallet Consumption, Permission Overwrite, PermissionId Frontrun
cards.detect: Session key security depends on correct enforcement of four invariants:
check: VERIFY: Session key security depends on correct enforcement of four invariants
PROVE: *Scenario A — Session key drains entire wallet [SK-1] (Shieldify, CRITICAL); Alice's smart wallet has a CredibleAccountModule with a session key SK authorized for...
ANTIPATTERN: permissionId decoded from userOp.signature which is NOT signed by EntryPoint
cards.antipattern: permissionId decoded from userOp.signature which is NOT signed by EntryPoint
cards.validWhen: Session key security depends on correct enforcement of four invariants

cards.title: AA Signature Replay — Missing Binding Fields in UserOperation and Enable Mode Hashes
cards.detect: This vulnerability exists because **inner EIP-712 hashes computed by the smart account omit one or more domain-binding...
check: VERIFY: inner EIP-712 hashes computed by the smart account omit one or more domain-binding fields (entryPoint address, nonce, chainId,...
PROVE: *Scenario A — EntryPoint upgrade replay [REPLAY-1]; User signs a userOp against EntryPoint v0.6.
ANTIPATTERN: Co-signer signs only (target, value, calldata) without nonce or chainId
cards.antipattern: Co-signer signs only (target, value, calldata) without nonce or chainId
cards.validWhen: This vulnerability exists because inner EIP-712 hashes computed by the smart account omit one or more domain-binding fields (entryPoint address, nonce, chainId,...
